creator: freebsd@gushi.org
text:
Hey there all,

Every once in a while a problem comes up many years later (in this case, it's trying to track down a user with a compromised wordpress install) and you say "Gee, I remember seeing something on a mailing list about this".

Oh wait, it's me.   I posted the thing to the mailing list.

This was a fairly trivial change.  Assuming I can get the original patches again, any chance it can be included?
